nasb.text: For the king trusts in the Lord, And through the lovingkindness of the Most High he will not be shaken.

esv.text: For the king trusts in the Lord, and through the steadfast love of the Most High he shall not be moved.

cnv.text: 王倚靠耶和華， 靠著至高者的慈愛，他必不至動搖。

ccb.text: 君王信靠耶和华， 靠着至高者的慈爱必不动摇。

csbs.text: 因为王依靠耶和华； 靠着至高者的慈爱，他不致动摇。
